classification: Event and interpretation leads only; not controlling quantitative inputs for the comparable annual series.

records.title: What's with all the smoke the last few years?
records.author: Ben Noll

graphic_snapshot.note: Research snapshot only. The copyrighted Washington Post graphic is referenced by URL and checksum, not republished as a project asset.

records.role: Context lead linking Canadian area burned and warmer fire seasons to the opportunity for smoke transport into the United States.
records.underlying_source_status: The post's chart must be traced to its original Canadian fire and temperature datasets before any values are reused.

records.title: Thick wildfire smoke lingers over Mid-Atlantic early Saturday
records.author: The Washington Post weather desk

observed_article_facts.note: Event-context figures from the visible article text; not a controlling annual-series input.

records.role: Documented 2026 U.S. smoke episode and lead to the operational smoke and air-quality products cited in the article.
records.underlying_source_status: Article observations are context; NOAA HMS, EPA AirNow/AQS, and Canadian fire products control any reconstructed measurements.
